top_tweets.text:
Introducing Interfaces

A design engineering magazine about building great interfaces.

A new issue is released every month covering topics across animation, typography, layout, color and everything else that makes an interface feel great.

https://t.co/5i4Ab4kW3e https://t.co/KEwV8bcy78
top_tweets.author: jakubkrehel
top_tweets.name: Jakub Krehel
top_tweets.summary_zh: 推出名為 Interfaces 的設計工程雜誌，每月發行，涵蓋動畫、排版、佈局、色彩等介面設計核心主題，專注於打造優秀介面的實務內容。

top_tweets.text: I'm excited to announce I'm joining the design team at Anthropic to work on their consumer products! https://t.co/cwUaNes49W
top_tweets.author: daniel__designs
top_tweets.name: Daniel Destefanis
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者宣布加入 Anthropic 的設計團隊，負責消費者產品開發。

top_tweets.text:
I’m not saying “no design.” I’m saying most apps can get away with just nailing the fundamentals.

Not every app needs layers of “visual expression,” motion, personality, or over-design-engineering in pursuit of delight.

What really matters when you want to get work done are:
top_tweets.author: shadcn
top_tweets.name: shadcn
top_tweets.summary_zh: 認為多數應用不需要過度設計，把基本面做好就足夠；相較於視覺表現、動效或追求愉悅感，真正重要的是幫助使用者完成工作的核心功能。

top_tweets.text: Graphic Design Trends You Should Try in 2026! 🪄 https://t.co/ovWK6GtmVY
top_tweets.author: UiSavior
top_tweets.name: UI/UX Savior
top_tweets.summary_zh: 整理了 2026 年平面設計趨勢建議，提供設計師參考方向。

top_tweets.text: Small tips based on my own experience and character design process 💜 https://t.co/RZT2jo6pjM
top_tweets.author: utainsy
top_tweets.name: Utainsy
top_tweets.summary_zh: 分享角色設計流程中的實用小技巧，基於作者個人經驗整理。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Blaze 2.0
top_products.author: Adam Nathan
top_products.tagline: AI marketer for SMBs complete w/ strategy, content, and ads
top_products.summary_zh: 為中小企業設計的 AI 行銷工具，提供完整的策略規劃、內容製作與廣告投放功能。

top_products.title: Googlebook
top_products.author: Chris Messina
top_products.tagline: A new kind of laptop designed for Gemini Intelligence
top_products.summary_zh: 專為 Gemini Intelligence 設計的新型筆記型電腦，深度整合 AI 功能。

top_products.title: SideNotes
top_products.author: Marcin Krzywonos
top_products.tagline: Take notes on your screen side
top_products.summary_zh: 讓使用者在螢幕側邊直接記錄筆記的工具，方便隨時捕捉想法。

top_products.title: Mi
top_products.author: Ivan Charapanau
top_products.tagline: 30-line zero-config CLI agent for bug fixes + refactoring
top_products.summary_zh: 僅需 30 行程式碼的零配置命令列工具，透過 AI 代理自動修復錯誤與重構程式碼。

top_products.title: Plate
top_products.author: Karl Plaude
top_products.tagline: Minimal project management for small teams
top_products.summary_zh: 為小型團隊設計的極簡專案管理工具，著重簡潔易用的協作體驗。

top_products.title: Mycelis
top_products.author: Bene Haller
top_products.tagline: Serverless AI workspace with smart routing & MCP agents
top_products.summary_zh: 無伺服器架構的 AI 工作空間，整合智慧路由與 MCP 代理功能。
